creator: ume@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,
 
 >>>>> On Tue, 25 May 2010 01:59:55 -0400 (EDT)
 >>>>> "Philip M. Gollucci" <pgollucci@p6m7g8.com> said:
 
 pgollucci> begin 644 cyrus-sasl-2.1.23.patch
 
 Thank you for the report.  Unfortunately, it seems your patch was not
 attached correctly in this PR.  Could you send it again?
 In anyways, I think the cause of this issue is removal of MD2 related
 functions by OpenSSL.  These are still used in Heimdal.  I don't have
 any idea how can I make some workaround for this issue by Cyrus-SASL
 port.
 
 Sincerely,
 
 --
 Hajimu UMEMOTO @ Internet Mutual Aid Society Yokohama, Japan
 ume@mahoroba.org  ume@{,jp.}FreeBSD.org
 http://www.imasy.org/~ume/
